rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN SAPONE et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Use Settled Statement Instead Of Reporters Transcript
rulings.Rulings: Lucilla Sapone's Motion to Use Settled Statement Instead of Reporter's Transcript is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Any party who objects to the tentative ruling and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on August 21, 2013.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER SECOND AMENDED AND RESTATED, HAROLD E. KORF TRUST, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustees Demurrer To Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provisions, To Impose Constructive Trust, And To Compel Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Frank Woo's Demurrer to Entire Petition is hereby overruled. Respondent Frank Woo's Demurrer to the first cause of action to invalidate the trust amendments based on a lack of testamentary capacity is hereby sustained with leave to amend. Amended petition must be filed with the court within 10 court days from the scheduled hearing date. Respondent Frank Woo's Demurrer to the first cause of action to invalidate the trust amendments on the grounds of undue influence is hereby sustained with leave to amend. Amended petition must be filed with the court within 10 court days from the scheduled hearing date. Respondent Frank Woo's demurrer to the second cause of action to compel an accounting is sustained without prejudice. Respondent Alvarez currently lacks standing to petition to compel accounting as he is not a beneficiary to the Second Amended Trust. Prevailing Party to prepare the order. Any party who wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on August 21, 2013, the day before the scheduled hearing date.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SHOU CHEN WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Maria Fang'S Petition For Probate
rulings.Rulings: See Tentative Ruling faxed to parties and filed 8/21/13. Any party who contests the tentative and requesting argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on August 21, 2013. Prevailing party to prepare the order.
